description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.7 Docker image. Define a single stage called publish_to_pypi and add a manual job named publish_to_pypi_prod that runs: python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade setuptools wheel, python3 setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade twine, set PATH=/root/.local/bin:$PATH, and twine upload -u $PYPI_USER -p $PYPI_PASSWORD dist/*. Add another manual job named publish_to_pypi_test in the same stage that runs the same first three commands, sets the same PATH, and then executes twine upload -u $PYPI_TEST_USER -p $PYPI_TEST_PASSWORD --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/*. Both jobs are triggered manually and publish the built distribution to the production PyPI repository and the Test PyPI repository respectively.
